name: LogiNext Delivery and Field Force Management API
what_it_does: LogiNext delivery and field force management REST API for logistics companies, retailers, and enterprises across Asia-Pacific, Middle East, and global markets to manage last-mile delivery optimization, field service routing, real-time delivery tracking, and fleet dispatch — enabling automated delivery order management, AI-powered route optimization, driver dispatch, customer notification, and delivery analytics through LogiNext's enterprise logistics platform. Enables AI agents to manage delivery order for last-mile fulfillment automation, handle route optimization for AI-powered route planning automation, access driver dispatch for field force assignment automation, retrieve real-time tracking for delivery status monitoring automation, manage customer notification for SMS and email delivery update automation, handle capacity planning for delivery fleet management automation, access analytics for logistics performance reporting automation, retrieve geofencing for delivery zone management automation, manage returns for reverse logistics automation, and integrate LogiNext with OMS, WMS, and e-commerce platforms for end-to-end delivery chain automation.
use_cases: Optimizing last-mile delivery routes for e-commerce and retail order fulfillment automation agents
Managing field service technician routing and scheduling for enterprise service dispatch automation agents
Providing real-time delivery tracking and customer notification for last-mile logistics automation agents
Integrating LogiNext with e-commerce OMS and WMS for automated order-to-delivery workflow automation agents
not_for: Long-haul freight management (LogiNext focuses on last-mile and field service, not long-haul trucking)
International customs clearance (LogiNext is delivery logistics, not customs/trade compliance)
Warehouse management (LogiNext manages delivery dispatch, not warehouse picking and packing)
best_when: An e-commerce company, logistics provider, or enterprise field service organization across APAC and Middle East wanting AI agents to optimize last-mile delivery routes, dispatch drivers, and manage delivery operations through LogiNext's logistics automation platform.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE IMPLEMENTATION REQUIRED: LogiNext is an enterprise platform requiring implementation project; automated instant API access assumption creates implementation_required; automated must complete LogiNext implementation engagement. GOOGLE MAPS DEPENDENCY: LogiNext routing uses Google Maps for geocoding and routing; automated route optimization without Google Maps assumption creates degraded routing accuracy; automated must ensure Google Maps API is accessible in deployment region. DRIVER APP IS MOBILE: LogiNext dispatches tasks to drivers through mobile app; automated API-only dispatch without driver app assumption creates no driver notification; automated must ensure drivers have LogiNext mobile app installed. MIDDLE EAST ARABIC RTL: For Middle East deployments, driver and customer interfaces need Arabic RTL support; automated LTR-only assumption creates poor driver UX in Arabic-speaking markets.

auth.notes: LogiNext uses API key for authentication. REST API with JSON. Mumbai, India HQ (with US office). Founded 2013 by Dhruvil Sanghvi and Manisha Raisinghani. Products: Delivery management, field force management, route optimization, real-time tracking, customer notifications, analytics. SDKs: None public. Operations in India, Southeast Asia, Middle East, US. Backed by Goldman Sachs, Tiger Global, PayPal. Competes with Onfleet and Bringg for last-mile delivery management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Trial environment for evaluation; production requires enterprise contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-task/delivery pricing; field force per-user pricing; enterprise annual contracts
pricing.notes: Mumbai IN. Goldman Sachs/Tiger Global backed. Per-delivery pricing. APAC and Middle East focus. Enterprise logistics.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; order creation and tracking APIs throttled per account tier

known_agent_gotchas: ORDER CREATION IS PREREQUISITE: LogiNext route optimization requires delivery orders to be created first; automated skip-order-creation assumption creates no routes to optimize; automated must create delivery orders before invoking route optimization

GEOCODING ACCURACY IS CRITICAL: LogiNext route optimization depends on accurate geocoded addresses; automated unvalidated address assumption creates routing to wrong location; automated must geocode and validate delivery addresses before order creation

DRIVER APP IS DELIVERY CHANNEL: LogiNext dispatches to drivers via mobile app (not SMS/call); automated dispatch-without-app assumption creates no driver notification; automated must ensure driver onboarding to LogiNext mobile app before dispatch automation

WEBHOOKS FOR DELIVERY EVENTS: Delivery status updates (picked up, on way, delivered, failed) are delivered via webhook; automated REST polling assumption creates delayed delivery awareness; automated must implement webhook handler for real-time delivery event tracking

CAPACITY PLANNING REQUIRED: Route optimization uses vehicle capacity constraints; automated unlimited vehicle assumption creates inaccurate route optimization; automated must configure vehicle capacity (weight, volume, max stops) for realistic route optimization
agent_readiness.security_notes: Logistics delivery platform. PDPB, PDPA, GDPR. API key. APAC/Middle East. Delivery and driver location data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Delivery logistics. PDPB, PDPA, GDPR. API key. APAC/Middle East. Delivery location and logistics data.
